title: Box Variation CSV Normalization
description: Normalized Grasshopper input lists from messy or mislabeled box variation CSV. Out-of-range values are allowed; the client flags them in the UI.

inputLists.description: Column-oriented box dimensions, one value per variation row

BoxDepth.description: Box depth in mm (150–450 is valid for compute; out-of-range values are still returned)

BoxHeight.description: Box height in mm (600–2600 is valid for compute; out-of-range values are still returned)

BoxWidth.description: Box width in mm (800–1000 is valid for compute; out-of-range values are still returned)

variationNames.description: Optional echo of box labels (e.g. Box 1, Box 2); client may use names from the source CSV
